narrative_seed_by_week.3: History of AI — symbolic → ML → deep learning → LLMs → agents / How LLMs work — tokens, training, inference, parameters / Why the same question gives different answers — temperature and sampling / AI in India today — healthcare, agriculture, vernacular translation / The jagged frontier — AI is superhuman at some tasks, unreliable at others

lab_activity_seed_by_week.3: Capability Probe — test Claude across 5 task types: creative, factual, logical, ethical, coding / Document what worked, what failed, where it hallucinated / Journal Entry #2 / →  Assessment 1 due this week  (see Assessment Plan)
